sections.heading: Material Sourcing Management
body: Material sourcing accounts for more than half of the product-development process, which makes it the single most consequential function in the operation. The company's Merchant Team manages sourcing directly, drawing on a select network of fabric suppliers and partners assembled over years of proven reliability.

sections.heading: Product Development
body: The company's involvement begins at concept and ends at the retail floor. Experienced pattern makers work alongside customers, translating briefs into production-ready designs at the speed, and with the accuracy, that commercial timelines demand.

sections.heading: Sampling
body: A self-contained sampling facility serves the complete product range. Its team works through continuous research and development toward a single object: the customer's complete satisfaction.

sections.heading: Cutting
body: The cutting floor operates on a double-shift schedule, supplying both undergarment and outerwear lines. Volume and organisation are treated as non-negotiable, and the floor is arranged accordingly.

sections.heading: Sewing
body: Each sewing line is configured for a specific product type, with defined quality standards and output targets; layouts vary with the requirement. The constant is efficiency that never comes at the cost of precision.

sections.heading: Printing
body: Rizvi Fashions operates a fully export-oriented printing facility, registered with the Bangladesh Garments Accessories & Packaging Manufacturers & Exporters Association (BGAPMEA). Equipped with fifteen printing tables of seventy-two feet each, it executes the full range of screen-printing techniques — rubber, puff, glitter, pigment, foil, flock, metallic, discharge, radium, reflective, high-density, plastisol, and silicon.
